allow: PowerShell($env:PORT="3999"; $proc = Start-Process node -ArgumentList "server.js" -PassThru -NoNewWindow -RedirectStandardOutput "srv.log" -RedirectStandardError "srverr.log"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; node -e "const{io}=require\('socket.io-client'\);const a=io\('http://localhost:3999'\);a.on\('connect',\(\)=>{a.emit\('create_room',{name:'Ana'},\(r\)=>{console.log\('create:',JSON.stringify\(r\)\);const b=io\('http://localhost:3999'\);b.on\('connect',\(\)=>{b.emit\('join_room',{code:r.code,name:'Bob'},\(r2\)=>{console.log\('join:',JSON.stringify\(r2\)\);a.emit\('start_game',{},\(r3\)=>{console.log\('start:',JSON.stringify\(r3\)\);}\);}\);}\);a.on\('round_start',\(d\)=>{console.log\('round_start round',d.round,'colorOK:',!!d.color\);process.exit\(0\);}\);}\);}\);setTimeout\(\(\)=>{console.log\('TIMEOUT'\);process.exit\(1\);},6000\);" 2>&1; Stop-Process -Id $proc.Id -Force)
